understanding.goal_understanding: Complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level: place every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN for the level, progressing until the final level is cleared.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently selected piece (shown as P) moves in 3-pixel grid-cell increments with MOVE_* actions; movement can be blocked or altered by walls (#) and other objects. Some adjacent objects (blocks B and potentially other pushables) can be pushed if immediately next to the selected piece in the move direction, causing both to shift together when space allows. Levels can have multiple selectable pieces (others shown as S); control switches via CLICK on the exact pixel/grid coordinates of the desired piece. The movement_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency and do not guarantee success or failure—attempting the move is required to confirm actual collision/interaction behavior.
